acceptanceStatement: All 72 deterministic family-context records were manually read for Traditional Chinese naturalness, mathematical consistency, unknown-role clarity, units/classifiers, grade boundary, context realism and unique-answer quality after the recorded FullFix rounds. No blocking semantic defect remains in the reviewed S58E scope.
scopeLimit: Acceptance covers the frozen 24 families and 72 registered deterministic context variants. Selector, canonical router, worksheet, renderer, public UI and production promotion remain outside S58E.
